name: Application submitted
description: The date the application was submitted
notes: Users need to know when an application was submitted so they can understand when the clock started and assess timeliness.

name: Invalid
description: The date from which the authority treated the application as invalid, which may differ from the date the validation check was completed or the applicant was notified.
notes: Users need to know if and when an application was deemed invalid so they can understand delays and what halted progression.

name: Valid
description: The date from which the authority treated the application as valid for statutory or process purposes, which may differ from the date the validation check was completed.
notes: Users need to know when an application was validated so they can see when formal assessment began and how long validation took.

name: Validation completed
description: The date the authority completed its validation check, which may differ from the date the application is treated as valid from.
notes: Users need to know when validation was completed so they can distinguish the validation admin task from the date the application is treated as valid.

name: Application published
description: The date the application was first published on the planning register or authority website.
notes: Users need to know when an application was first published so they can understand when it became publicly visible and distinguish publication from publicity or consultation dates.

name: Publicity start
description: The date publicity for the application started under Article 15 of the Development Management Procedure Order.
notes: Users need to know when application publicity started so they can distinguish statutory publicity from publication on the register and consultee consultation dates.

name: Additional information requested
description: The date the authority asked for further information
notes: Users need to know when further information was requested so they can see what triggered delays and what is outstanding.

name: Additional information received
description: The date the applicant supplied the requested information
notes: Users need to know when the requested information was supplied so they can judge whether the application can progress.

name: Consultation start
notes: Users need to know when public/consultee consultation began so they can assess openness and statutory timing.

name: Consultation end
notes: Users need to know when consultation closed so they can understand deadlines and whether responses were in time.

name: Consultees contacted
notes: Users need to know when consultees were contacted so they can confirm engagement took place and align it with consultation timelines.

name: Call-in direction issued
description: The date the direction to call in the application was issued
notes: Users need to know when an application was called in so they can understand the change in decision route and timetable.

name: Committee date
description: The date of the committee meeting
notes: Users need to know when an application is going to committee so they can follow decision-making and prepare representations.

name: Resolution to grant
description: The date the determining authority resolved to grant permission before the formal decision notice was issued.
notes: Users need to know when the determining authority has resolved to grant so they can understand the application's direction before the formal decision notice is issued.

name: Resolution to refuse
description: The date the determining authority resolved to refuse permission before the formal decision notice was issued.
notes: Users need to know when the determining authority has resolved to refuse so they can understand the application's direction before the formal decision notice is issued.

name: Time extension agreed
description: The date an extension of time was agreed
notes: Users need to know when an extension of time was agreed so they can assess revised deadlines and accountability for delays.
